title: Resolve open Advance GitHub bug queue

tasks.title: #37 checkpoint recovery: add red tests and implement phase-aware clean-tree retry so committed checkpoint partial success can be recorded/retried without misleading clean semantics or silent ledger success.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented #37 checkpoint recovery tests/fix, plus inline blocker fix for adv_run_test outer safety-net timeout. Verified build and targeted vitest suites. Checkpoint recorded clean at facdaa1ab1dadfc8a22c16d2d8d0961bf61abb50.
tasks.completed_by: Completed after workflow repair. Checkpoint recorded clean at facdaa1.

tasks.title: #36/#38 worktree cleanup: add red tests and implement deletion routing for missing-from-disk registry cleanup and clean merged non-ADV branches while preserving dirty/unmerged/active ADV blocks.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added regression coverage and deletion routing for #36/#38. Missing-from-disk registry entries now remove stale registry/pending-delete state before ADV integration when path and branch are gone. Non-ADV registry entries without changeId now use merged-to-default routing and skip archived-change requirement while preserving dirty/unmerged blocks. Verified targeted tests, check, and build. Checkpoint ea8d72265a05f1c47cca6345244bf5dc876d3ecd.
tasks.completed_by: Completed #36/#38 worktree cleanup task. Checkpoint committed ea8d722.

tasks.title: #33 temporal health/status: add red tests and implement serviceability precedence for diagnose and stale-queue/status warnings, including health-probe composition.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added #33 regression coverage and serviceability precedence in adv_status. Stale queue recommendations are now suppressed for the active project queue when queue serviceability is proven by fresh server poller evidence. Existing diagnose path already gates stale-queue recovery by queueServiceability. Verified temporal health/serviceability tests, check, and build. Checkpoint 3098812bb88b6fc4c1c00693860799776455b4b3.
tasks.completed_by: Completed #33 temporal health/status task. Checkpoint committed 3098812.

proposal.notes: User replied `approve`; worker restart recovered Temporal serviceability after initial mutation timeout/stale disk view.

discovery.notes: User approved agreement after discovery. Current-state evidence recorded: checkpoint.ts partial-success path, branch-integration archived-change requirement, worktree delete integration-before-cleanup ordering, temporal-ops multi-source health evidence.

design.notes: Independent validator returned CAUTION, no conflict. Accepted refinements: include health-probe stale-queue composition in #33; make #37 clean-tree retry phase-aware and preserve committed-vs-clean ledger semantics.

planning.notes: User approved prep task graph: 3 inline-TDD implementation tasks covering #37 checkpoint recovery, #36/#38 worktree cleanup, and #33 temporal health/status precedence.

execution.notes: Execution complete: all 3 tasks done with TDD evidence and task checkpoints. Verified: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/status-temporal-health.test.ts src/tools/temporal-ops.test.ts src/temporal/queue-serviceability.test.ts passed; pnpm test -- src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts passed; pnpm run check passed; pnpm run build passed. Worktree clean at 3098812.

acceptance.notes: User replied `accept` after review findings showed no blockers/issues and verification passed.

release.notes: User replied `sign off`. Strict validation passed with non-blocking warnings only (no spec deltas, discovery evidence section warning). Conformance status has no locked specs. Verification already passed: changed-area tests, pnpm run check, pnpm run build.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal has no Scope section. What files and modules will be affected?
